who: logistics coordinators for freight brokers managing 10-20 shipments/week
offer: For logistics coordinators processing 10-20 shipments/week, lack of visibility causes late orders. We provide a supply chain visibility dashboard instead of manual tracking through emails and phone calls.
problem: Lack of real-time visibility into shipment status and estimated time of arrival.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities asking for logistics tools
Indie Hackers discussions on shipment tracking solutions
DM outreach to logistics coordinators with demo video
Engage in community forums for logistics coordinators
try_it: Let users try real-time shipment status updates and ETA notifications on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing the manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post a weekly progress update in a relevant community
automation_simplification_ideas: One-click export of a simple report
